Billing-service integration refactor is the sprint focus this week.
Pair-programmed the provisioning API with Priya over lunch.
On-call rotation next week; reviewing runbooks and escalation paths.
Go is the daily driver, Python for the small tooling around it.
Squad shooter with Jake tonight, solo roguelike on the weekend.
Cleaned the dust filters on the PC at 1 AM, evens out the day.
Sunday call with Dad in Sacramento, practical and warm as always.
Mom's care package came — snacks and socks; answered 60% of her texts.
Mia sent a meme and a track, roasting me with love as usual.
Marcus left good code-review feedback on the PR today.
Gym at Cascade Fitness before work — lift, then cardio.
Saturday run on the Burke-Gilman if the weather holds.
Stir-fry tonight; texted Mom for the mac and cheese clarification.
Cold brew from Elm Coffee, one at home and one at the office.
Half-built side project in Notion, abandoned right as it got good.
IPA Friday with Jake at Pike Street Grill.
Terraform and Docker changes merged, Kubernetes rollout clean.
Reading Designing Data-Intensive Applications on the bus.
Equity unlocks around August, the one-year mark at Ridgeline.
Day hike in the Cascades planned if the forecast cooperates.
Lo-fi playlist for focus; I refuse to share the decompression one.
Leo pinged on Discord with a tech article and a voice chat.
Naan and Curry for dinner — chicken tikka and garlic naan.
Planning the Japan trip to meet extended family, finally.
